implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Static frontend served by Express. It does not initiate any API requests or trigger the user‑fetch→CSV workflow.
implementation.name: index.html
implementation.pseudo_code:
Render static HTML page
No JavaScript logic
No interaction with backend endpoints

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Provides read access to users.csv. Reads CSV from disk, converts to JSON, and returns the parsed result.
implementation.name: GET /api/users
implementation.pseudo_code:
IF users.csv does not exist:
    RETURN 404 error
READ users.csv from disk
PARSE CSV to JSON
RETURN parsed JSON

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Fetches users from JSONPlaceholder, converts the result to CSV, and writes the file to persistent storage. Does not apply any filtering by location and writes an empty CSV when the response contains an empty array.
implementation.name: main()
implementation.pseudo_code:
SEND HTTP GET request to USERS_URL
IF response not ok:
    THROW error
PARSE JSON array into users
BUILD CSV headers from user fields
FOR each user in users:
    convert to CSV row via userToRow
JOIN rows into CSV string
ENSURE data directory exists
WRITE users.csv to disk
LOG success

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Converts each User object into a CSV‑safe row. All JSON fields are included and escaped.
implementation.name: userToRow()
implementation.pseudo_code:
FOR each user field:
    escape via escapeCsvField
RETURN array of field strings

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Ensures proper CSV formatting by detecting and escaping commas, quotes, and newlines.
implementation.name: escapeCsvField()
implementation.pseudo_code:
IF value contains comma, quote, or newline:
    wrap value in quotes and escape internal quotes
RETURN processed value

missing_implementations: before saving information check filter for data with location as Boone
If the API request fails or the response is empty, the system does not create or modify the CSV file and signals an error.
